name: Mud & Snow Tire Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the German chocolate cake according to the package directions.
2. When the cake is still warm, use a fork to poke holes in the top of the cake.
3. Pour the sweetened condensed milk over the cake, ensuring it is slightly warmed.
4. Spread the caramel fudge topping evenly over the cake.
5. Cover the cake with whipped topping.
6. Sprinkle the chopped Heath candy bars on top of the cake.
